description: men's Earthkeepers City Biking Drivers have been engineered specifically for eco-conscious people who spend a lot of time riding their bike instead of driving and don't want to bother with changing into a differnt pair once they've arrived at their destination. timberland's exclusive bike plate technology includes a pedal flex plate which allows your foot to flex normally while walking but keeps stiff during pedaling for stability while you're on your bike. These fashionable, dual-duty leather oxfords are also made with 42% recycled rubber outsoles.Upper Premium full-grain leather upper offers rugged durability timberland's ground-breaking trouser strap keeps pants safely out of bike chains Reflective detail for enhanced safety Embossed logo beside the heel cup Stitched overlay of detailing in nubuck leather for added structure Midsole Leather-covered footbed for superior comfort Timberland's proprietary uniflex bike plate promotes efficient energy transfer to bike pedals, but remains flexible for comfortable walking Exclusive anti-fatigue technology provides all-day comfort and support Outsole Injected TPU lugs offers outstanding traction and flexible, lightweight performance shoe careUse the appropriate Timberland leahter polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas of the shoe
